suggestions.title: CSS tooltip only triggers on :hover — keyboard users see nothing (5th flag)
suggestions.description: Office floor character tooltips use CSS :hover only. Keyboard-focused users (Tab nav) never see worker names/roles. Add :focus-within or a JS-driven tooltip that responds to focus events. This has been flagged 5 times now — it's the #1 persistent accessibility gap.

suggestions.title: Card flip back-face not hidden from screen readers when front is showing (4th flag)
suggestions.description: WorkerCard's back face (.worker-card__back) is always in the DOM and readable by screen readers even when the card isn't flipped. Add aria-hidden={!isFlipped} to the back div and aria-hidden={isFlipped} to the front div. Already partially done but the conditional is wrong — isFlipped check uses || undefined which doesn't toggle correctly.

suggestions.title: Mobile header overflow — vibe pill + sync button + theme toggle clip at 375px (4th flag)
suggestions.description: At 375px viewport, the header-right flex container overflows. The vibe pill, sync button, header badge, and theme toggle don't wrap properly. Add flex-wrap: wrap to .header-right and consider hiding the header-badge on screens <480px, or moving it below the title.

suggestions.title: MANAGER_QUOTES is permanently unreachable dead code (5th flag)
suggestions.description: Office.jsx has VIBE_QUOTES object but the old MANAGER_QUOTES constant (or its usage pattern) is never referenced from any render path. The quotes only show in Bloberto's speech bubble but are selected from VIBE_QUOTES directly. If MANAGER_QUOTES was removed, great — but verify there's no orphaned reference. The speech bubble quote selection logic could also benefit from a stable random seed per sync interval to avoid flickering.

suggestions.title: DEFAULT_ROSTER still hardcoded in Office.jsx — move to constants.js (6th flag)
suggestions.description: DEFAULT_ROSTER array is defined in Office.jsx but it's configuration data, not component logic. Move it to src/utils/constants.js alongside ROLE_EMOJIS and ROLE_COLORS for consistency and single-source-of-truth. This has been flagged 6 times — it's a 2-minute move.

suggestions.title: CharacterAvatar and Character components missing React.memo (4th flag)
suggestions.description: Office.jsx: CharacterAvatar is a pure function of its props but isn't memoized. Every 30s poll re-renders all characters even when nothing changed. Wrap both CharacterAvatar and Character in React.memo(). Free optimization, zero risk.

suggestions.title: Vibe streak counter has no tooltip for new visitors (3rd flag)
suggestions.description: The 'x7' number next to the vibe pill has no title or aria-label. First-time visitors see a random number with zero context. Add title='Consecutive syncs at this vibe level' to the streak span.

suggestions.title: Empty state message references night time regardless of actual time
suggestions.description: EmptyState component always shows '🌙 Everyone's off the clock' with a moon emoji and 'The office is quiet... for now 🌙'. This is misleading during daytime hours. Consider using the same time-aware greeting logic from the header, or a neutral message like 'No workers on duty right now.'

suggestions.title: R-key sync shortcut fires during text input in contentEditable elements
suggestions.description: The keyboard shortcut handler checks for INPUT and TEXTAREA tags but not contentEditable divs or elements with role='textbox'. If any future feature adds editable areas, pressing R will trigger a sync. Add a contentEditable check: if (e.target.isContentEditable) return.

suggestions.title: Orphaned .stat-card.done CSS rule — no element uses it
suggestions.description: App.css has .stat-card.done .stat-value { color: var(--blue); } but no stat card ever gets class 'done'. Remove it or document why it exists for future use.

suggestions.title: Whiteboard text truncates to 'SH IP IT' on narrow mobile viewports
suggestions.description: The office-whiteboard element at 5.5% width with word-break breaks 'SHIP IT' mid-word at 375px (only ~20px wide). Either increase min-width on mobile, use emoji-only format below 480px, or hide the whiteboard text entirely on small screens.

suggestions.title: WindowElement getHour() recreated every render
suggestions.description: Office.jsx WindowElement component defines getHour() inside the component body. It's recreated every render and also used in useEffect. Extract it outside the component as a module-level helper since it has no dependency on component state.
